version="26.0.7" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="mm-page-table-hal" name="mm_page_table"> <mxGraphModel dx="1406" dy="907" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="lane_mm" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF4FF;strokeColor=#8BBBE8;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="75" width="1200" height="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_hal" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFDF3;strokeColor=#7CCB95;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="292" width="1200" height="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_arch" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E6;strokeColor=#E5A85A;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="550" width="1200" height="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label_mm" value="<b>上层：mm 通用层</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">只表达页表语义，</span><span style="font-size: 12px; text-align: center;">不关心 satp/CSR，不直接拼 PTE bit，</span><span style="font-size:12px">不写死某个 ISA 的 PTE/token/TLB 细节</span>" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=13;align=left;fontSize=15;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="75" y="88" width="520" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label_hal" value="<b>中层：HAL PagingArch trait</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">统一抽象架构相关参数与编码规则</span><div><span style="font-size: 12px; text-align: center;">HAL：隔离 token 激活方式、PTE 编码和 TLB 刷新差异</span><span style="font-size:12px"><br></span></div>" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=13;align=left;fontSize=15;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="75" y="306" width="520" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label_arch" value="<b>下层：架构实现</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">把差异封装为对应 ISA 的 HAL 实现</span>" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=13;align=left;fontSize=15;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="75" y="562" width="520" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="top_pagetable" value="<b>PageTable</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">map / unmap / translate<br>复用同一套页表遍历与映射语义</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4F8BC9;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=12;fontSize=14;spacing=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="95" y="145" width="315" height="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="top_pte" value="<span><b style="">PageTableEntry</b><br><span style="font-size: 12px;">抽象 ppn / flags / valid<br>不直接依赖具体 PTE 位布局</span></span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4F8BC9;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=12;fontSize=14;spacing=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="495" y="145" width="315" height="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="top_va" value="<b>VirtAddr / VirtPageNum</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">虚拟地址规范化与索引计算<br>由架构参数决定边界与 canonical 规则</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4F8BC9;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=12;fontSize=14;spacing=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="890" y="145" width="315" height="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hal_main" value="<b>PagingArch trait</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">通用 mm 代码只调用这些接口；具体实现由架构层提供</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#35A35C;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontSize=13;spacing=8;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="406" y="307.5" width="488" height="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_addr" value="<b>1. 地址参数</b><br><code>VA_BITS</code><br><code>LEVELS</code><br><code>INDEX_BITS</code>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#35A35C;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontSize=13;spacing=8;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="95" y="410" width="260" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_token" value="<b>2. 地址空间 token</b><br><code>make_token</code><br><code>activate_token</code><br><code>flush_tlb</code>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#35A35C;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontSize=13;spacing=8;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="410" width="260" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_pte" value="<b>3. PTE 编解码</b><br><code>make_pte</code> / <code>make_dir_entry</code><br><code>pte_ppn</code> / <code>pte_flags</code>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#35A35C;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontSize=13;spacing=8;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="675" y="410" width="260" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_walk" value="<b>4. 页表遍历</b><br><code>vpn_index</code><br><code>normalize_virt_addr_input</code><br><code>canonicalize_vaddr</code>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#35A35C;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=10;fontSize=13;spacing=8;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="965" y="410" width="220" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arch_riscv" value="<b>RISC-V Sv39</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">• token/激活：按 Sv39 satp 语义切换<br>• PTE：Sv39 PPN + R/W/X/U/G/A/D 等标志<br>• 目录项与叶子项编码较统一</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#C57B18;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=12;fontSize=14;spacing=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="610" width="475" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arch_loong" value="<b>LoongArch64</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">• token/激活：按 LoongArch CSR/TLB 语义切换<br>• PTE：位布局与 RISC-V 不同<br>• 需要单独的 <code>make_dir_entry</code> 编码目录项</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#C57B18;strokeWidth=2;shadow=0;arcSize=12;fontSize=14;spacing=10;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="695" y="610" width="475" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note_reuse" value="上层代码复用；架构差异下沉到 HAL" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;strokeWidth=1.5;arcSize=8;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;labelBackgroundColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="520" width="410" height="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_top_1" value="" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 37px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span: 不关心 satp/CSR，不直接拼 PTE bit，
不写死某个 ISA 的 PTE/token/TLB 细节

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span: 统一抽象架构相关参数与编码规则
HAL：隔离 token 激活方式、PTE 编码和 TLB 刷新差异

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 511px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span: 把差异封装为对应 ISA 的 HAL 实现

switch.text: 下层：架构实现 把差异封装为对应 ISA 的 HAL 实现

map / unmap / translate
复用同一套页表遍历与映射语义

不直接依赖具体 PTE 位布局

虚拟地址规范化与索引计算

div.div:
3. PTE 编解码
make_pte / make_dir_entry
pte_ppn / pte_flags

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 206px; height: 1px; padding-top: 372px; margin-left: 923px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 457px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 90px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span:
• token/激活：按 Sv39 satp 语义切换
• PTE：Sv39 PPN + R/W/X/U/G/A/D 等标志
• 目录项与叶子项编码较统一

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 457px; height: 1px; padding-top: 571px; margin-left: 655px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.span:
• token/激活：按 LoongArch CSR/TLB 语义切换
• PTE：位布局与 RISC-V 不同
• 需要单独的 make_dir_entry 编码目录项
